description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage. Add a test job that runs only for merge requests. In this job execute the following shell commands in order: apt-get update; apt-get -y install clang; apt-get -y install valgrind; curl https://notabug.org/VictorSCushman/EMU/raw/master/EMUtest.h > deps/EMU/EMUtest.h; make; make install; make test. Use the default Docker image and no services, caches, or artifacts.
